case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. FELI CIAONG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CIAONG, FELI DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED JAN-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CIAONG, FELI
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $432.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CIAONG, FELI
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CIAONG, FELI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIAONG, FELI $10,765.97 PRINCIPAL, $432.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,198.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
